title: S5 follow-up — importer/resolver emit installable hook fittings (not reported-only)

tests.summary: 5 passed — readUntaggedHookGroups skips Garrison-owned groups; importer emits imported-hook-<event> component_shape:hook fittings; emitted fitting passes validate-fitting (4-check pipeline); resolveArtifacts -> hook-group artifact; installFitting writes the owner-scoped _garrison group + records owner/events in the lock

e2e.summary: N/A — CLI/backend slice; behavioral proof is the committed re-runnable test + a validate-fitting PASS on an emitted fitting

video.note: CLI/backend slice — no walkthrough-able UI; the committed test (incl. validate-fitting + install round-trip) is the re-runnable gate

notes: Resolves the S5-importer 'hook-fitting emission reported-only' blocker. The install path (installFitting hook-group routing via the owner-scoped settings writer) was already wired by S3; the gap was emission + resolution, now closed. Honest limitation logged: emission is emit-only (captures the shape for version control/portability like skills); installing an emitted hook fitting onto the SAME machine it was imported from would create an owned copy alongside the still-present untagged original (a duplicate) — de-dup-on-install (strip the matching untagged group) is a logged follow-up, kept out to honor the keep-both decision. Grouping is per-event (no metadata exists to recover feature-level grouping).
